---
title: "About Robo AI Digest"
---

![](assets/robo-mascot.jpg){.rad-about-portrait fig-align="center" width="240"}

## The Mission: Signal Over Noise {.rad-h2}

In a world drowning in AI hype and daily announcements, **Robo AI Digest** was born from a simple necessity: the need for clarity. Our mission is to filter the global flow of information and deliver a precise, reliable, and accessible briefing on what truly matters in the world of Artificial Intelligence.

## What We Cover {.rad-h2}

::: {.rad-list}
- **Intelligence & LLMs** — shifts in Large Language Models and Foundation models.
- **Workplace Automation** — tools and workflows that actually increase productivity.
- **Industry Breakthroughs** — advancements that move the needle in business and research.
- **Policy & Ethics** — regulations, safety frameworks, and societal impact.
:::

## Why "Robo"? {.rad-h2}

The "Robo" in our name stands for autonomy and precision. By leveraging advanced AI to scout and synthesize news, we provide a digest that is consistent, unbiased, and focused purely on the facts. We don't just repeat news; we summarize the essence so you can stay informed in minutes, not hours.

[// STAY AHEAD OF THE CURVE · SIMPLE · BRIEF · RELIABLE]{.rad-mono-meta}

## Contact {.rad-h2}

If you have questions, suggestions, or want to collaborate, please use the form below.

```{=html}
<form name="contact" method="POST" data-netlify="true" class="rad-form">
  <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
    <label for="name" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--fg-3);">// NAME</label>
    <input type="text" name="name" id="name" required style="width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-2); border-radius: var(--radius-2); color: var(--fg-1); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 14px;" />
  </div>
  <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
    <label for="email" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--fg-3);">// EMAIL</label>
    <input type="email" name="email" id="email" required style="width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-2); border-radius: var(--radius-2); color: var(--fg-1); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 14px;" />
  </div>
  <div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
    <label for="message" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--fg-3);">// MESSAGE</label>
    <textarea name="message" id="message" required style="width: 100%; height: 140px; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-2); border-radius: var(--radius-2); color: var(--fg-1); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 14px; resize: vertical;"></textarea>
  </div>
  <div>
    <button type="submit" style="background: var(--signal); color: var(--bg-0); border: 1px solid var(--signal); padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: var(--radius-2); cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;">SEND_</button>
  </div>
</form>
```
